recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Russian Lolita
recommendations.overview: Very loosely based on Nabokov’s ‘Lolita’, this is the story of a writer renting a room at a single mother’s house that starts an affair with the daughter of her.

recommendations.title: Maine Pyar Kiya
recommendations.overview: After Suman's father leaves her in the care of another family while he travels abroad, she falls in love with Prem. However, in order to for them to marry, Prem has to prove to Suman's father that he is not the same as his own dad.

recommendations.title: Abzurdah
recommendations.overview: A disenfranchised 16-year-old girl connects to an older man on the internet and after a brief one-sided affair descends into obsession and anorexia.

recommendations.title: Floating Clouds
recommendations.overview: A married Japanese forester during WWII is sent to Indochina to manage forests. He meets a young Japanese typist and promises to leave his wife. He doesn't and after the war, she turns up and the affair resumes.

recommendations.title: Blown Away
recommendations.overview: After her mother is killed by a car bomb, a 17-year-old girl lives a reckless and decadent lifestyle. She begins having sex with a boy who works at a local ski resort. He falls in love, and she tells him of her suspicions that her strict father was r

recommendations.title: Dear Zindagi
recommendations.overview: Kaira, a young girl, faces problems in her relationships. She meets Dr Jehangir, who helps her resolve her issues with her parents and get a new perspective on life, which leads to her following her passion and an improvement in her love life.

recommendations.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
recommendations.overview: Per her mother's last wish, an 8 year old girl sets out to reunite her father with his college best friend who was in love with him.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.
